function mintRoom(string metadataURI, string theme, string originEvent, address[] initialParticipants, uint8[] roles, bool isPrivate, bool isStable, bool isSoulbound, uint8 roomType, uint256 unlockTime, string storageCID, bool isEncryptedStorage, string aiSeed, string tone, bool evolves) external returns (uint256)
function getRoomAI(uint256 roomId) external view returns (string aiSeed, string tone, bool evolves)
function getRoomParticipants(uint256 roomId) external view returns (address[])
function ownerOf(uint256 tokenId) external view returns (address)
function tokenURI(uint256 tokenId) external view returns (string)
event RoomCreated(uint256 indexed roomId, string theme, uint8 roomType, address creator)
event ParticipantInvited(uint256 indexed roomId, address invitee, uint8 role)
